component.name: View Session
component.description: Session row card: date (`Typography/Body-Bold`), time range (11.9px secondary), duration (`Typography/Metric` scale, non-uppercase), chevron. Expanded panel: tinted `Foundation/Surface/Subtle` @ 30%, top border `rgba(43,52,65,0.05)`, EDIT pill (`Semantic/Status/Error/BG` + Error text + pencil), “Add to Session” + four 56×~74 quick tiles (Note / Material / Photo / Voice) with activity icon colors, then empty copy or attachment rows.

implementationNotes: Quick-capture glyphs: `QuickCaptureTileIcon` (`newNote`, `newMaterial`, `addPhoto`, `voiceMemo`) scaled to ~16px in tiles and rows.
Time range: Ubuntu Sans Mono 11.9px / 20px line height + secondary color to align with Field Book density (Figma lists Inter for this line).
Attachment list: pass `attachments`; `expandedAttachments` with an empty array shows the same empty message as `expandedEmpty`.

codeProps.attachments: optional ViewSessionAttachment[]; listed when variant is expandedAttachments and length > 0
codeProps.emptyMessage: optional; default No notes, materials or photos yet
codeProps.onToggle: optional; header becomes a button with aria-expanded
